content.en:
After getting rid of the Golden Phoenix Bird, Ye Tian stayed in a safe place, and then reunited his will clone.

He is not afraid of wasting time, and slowly condenses the clone of the will.

After a long time, a clone of the will was condensed.

In this way, with one more will clone, Ye Tian's chances of survival here are greater.

Ye Tian let his will clone keep shuttling, even if the will clone fell, it would not have much impact.

this day.

Ye Tian found himself leaving this black ocean and came to a ruin, this ruin should be an incomparably huge island or a ruin pattern formed by the division of the land.

After coming here, Ye Tian sensed some extreme creatures.

However, these Extreme Path Creatures are not the same as those Extreme Path Creatures who are confused and have no intelligence, they are similar to the Extreme Path Creatures of the Extreme Path Source Sea, and they all have wisdom.

"No, these Extreme Creatures are not pure Extreme Creatures, they should be descendants of Extreme Creatures!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He immediately went into hiding, not meeting the descendants of these extreme creatures.

And the descendants of these Extreme Dao creatures are comparable to ordinary perfect controllers, and some may even only have the strength of half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm.

"Strange, why are the Extreme Creatures here so weak, and they are completely different from those Extreme Creatures of the Golden Phoenix Bird, as if they are two regions!"

Ye Tian felt very strange.

Moreover, the water in this ruined area is no longer black, but gradually turning into blue water.

It's as if the Black Sea is not normal, and this is the normal situation.

"I will definitely be found when I enter here as a human being, the Extreme Dao creature seems to have an antagonistic relationship with the cultivator, it seems that the body of the Void Sparrow must be copied again, and let the Void Sparrow copy the body into this area to investigate the situation!"

Ye Tian decided.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian annihilated the replica body on the Black Island, and then re-copied the body of the Void Sparrow here.

Soon after, the Void Sparrow body was copied.

Swish!

Ye Tian kept shuttling with the body of the Void Sparrow and came to this piece of ruins.

Extreme creatures are different from cultivators, there are no cities in this area, but there are temporary gathering places, as well as the territory of extreme creatures.

When Ye Tian arrived as a Void Sparrow Creature, it also attracted the attention of many descendants of Extreme Dao Creature.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian learned about the situation here as the Void Sparrow, and the Void Sparrow was a purebred Extreme Path creature, and his status was very high here.

Therefore, many descendants of Extreme Dao Creatures were very respectful to Ye Tian, and it was naturally very easy to inquire about the news.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to roughly understand the situation here.

It turns out that this black ocean area is called the Forbidden Black Sea, and it is rumored that in the infinite era, a group of extreme creatures at the level of the Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm fought here, causing the environment here.

And the Extreme Creatures born in this area are not intelligent, and the Extreme Creatures do not dare to stay here for a long time, otherwise they will gradually be affected by the Forbidden Black Sea, and thus lose their minds.

However, the Forbidden Black Sea's Extreme Path creatures will not leave the Forbidden Black Sea, so their descendants will not be invaded by the Forbidden Black Sea Extreme Creatures if they stay here.

And this piece of ruins is called the Tianxu Sea, and it is also one of the battlefields, but it has little impact, and there are a lot of resources born, so they will stay here.

And after Ye Tian's understanding, he finally confirmed the origin of this place.

"I didn't expect this place to be the Extreme Deep Sea!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Of course, this is not a place where the extreme deep sea thrives, but only on the edge.

And there are many Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and there are even many Extreme Dao creatures at the level of the Perfect Controller of the Three Realms, and the one in charge of the Extreme Dao creatures is a huge force - the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

All Extreme Dao creatures belong to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, and no Extreme Dao creature dares to violate the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Ye Tian didn't know much information, after all, this was only the edge of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and the strength of the Extreme Dao creatures here was not strong, and they belonged to the bottom of the Extreme Dao creatures.

Perhaps their elders used to be powerful, but now that their lineage is gone, they have to stay here.

But just a simple understanding, Ye Tian found that the strength of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea was too terrifying, and it was many times stronger than the Eternal Ruins.

For example, the Daoless Tower, although there are also Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, but there are only a dozen powerhouses at the level of Super Perfect Controllers, and the combined number of Super Perfect Controllers of the nine top forces in the Eternal Ruins is only more than a hundred, plus some scattered cultivation, at most more than two hundred.

However, at the beginning, there were thousands of Extreme Dao creatures that Ye Tian had seen in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, which were comparable to the level of a super-level perfect controller, and even more than that.

It is conceivable how many Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea are comparable to the super level Perfect Controller, and how many Extreme Path creatures are at the level of the Perfect Controller of the Three Realms, the number is absolutely terrifying.

"There are also many eternal heavens and earths at the end of the realm that are comparable to the eternal ruins, and there may be eternal heavens and earths that are more powerful than the eternal ruins, and there are many eternal heavens and earths that appear in the space-time ancestral realm, and these eternal heavens and earths may all be united, so that there is hope to fight against the Extreme Dao Deep Sea!" Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he still felt that in terms of the number of super-level perfect controllers or perfect controllers, they must not be comparable to the extreme creatures.

Because it is too simple for a Extreme Creature to become a Extreme Creature, it is also very simple to become a Super Perfect Controller.

But among cultivators, it is too difficult to become a super-perfect master.

The Extreme Dao Deep Sea was very powerful, but Ye Tian had no fear.

For him, the more powerful the Extreme Deep Sea, the more resources there are, and the more benefits he will receive.

Ye Tian wanted to find some extreme creatures that could improve his will here in Tianxu, and after inquiring, he really found information.

According to the revelations of several Extreme Dao creatures, the Extreme Dao treasures that can enhance their will are also uncommon in the Extreme Deep Sea, and their value is incomparably high.

But a relatively far away place, a territory called Shifang Dragon Island, where there are even extreme path creatures at the level of the perfect controller of the Void Realm, there has been a trade between extreme realm treasures.

After Ye Tian got the news, he immediately rushed to Shifang Dragon Island.

"I hope that I can obtain an extreme treasure that can improve my will on the Ten Directions Dragon Island!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.
